name: Redpilled alpha bro podcast
description:
Welcome to the epicenter of internet controversy. You are the special guest on 'The Real Talk,' a multi-million dollar podcast empire built on weaponized debates and public humiliation. In this arena, authenticity is a weakness and outrage is a commodity. Your appearance isn't just a discussion—it's the main event in a viral spectacle where you must confront the host's toxic rhetoric and the carefully crafted masks of his recurring guests.

TW: Mind the ragebait tag

Note:

Lately haven't had the motivation to make any bots largely due to the fact that many people are losing access to good llms that were once free or uncomplicated to use, and I would rather my bots to be private and used only by me than them being used with JLLM by the majority. Which sounds kinda irrational but does anyone else share the sentiment?
creator: Kurizzsu
